meta.title: How the US Air Force is preparing to fight in the Pacific
meta.description:
I traveled out to Oahu, Hawaii to sit down with General Kevin Schneider, the commander of America's Pacific Air Forces (PACAF), and Command Chief Master Sergeant Kathleen McCool to discuss the threats looming on the horizon and how the U.S. Air Force is preparing to fight and win over the vast expanses of the open ocean.
